working_on: Engine hardening for restart: subprocess env scrubbing across hooks + validate.py, atomic-write wrapper around mempalace mine, boot-time shared-state health probes (chromadb palace + repo config) wired into the soft-warn lifecycle, ADR 0045 + ops-doc updates. Phase 4 graph validation displaced to S-0036.
outcome_summary: Engine hardening landed per ADR 0045: subprocess env scrubbing (helpers + autouse fixture hoisted into engine/tools/conftest.py; applied to 4 hooks + validate.py's 4 code-gate subprocess calls); atomic-write wrapper around `mempalace hook run` (cp -a snapshot, post-mine probe, rollback on broken-2/SIGSEGV, rotate to palace.last-good); boot-time shared-state probes wired into validate.py default + new --health-probe-only mode invoked from session-start.sh; shutdown soft-warn aggregation across all session validate-history.jsonl entries. Validator 14 → 16 checks. 173 tests pass; ruff + mypy --strict clean. Phase 4 graph validation displaced to S-0036. Side discovery: bash 3.2 incompatibility in session-start.sh persistent-warn loop logged in HANDOFF.md (not introduced by this session).
